docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 4/29/22. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO HOMEAWAY.COM, INC-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2022 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAY-13-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SONIA SOHN IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT HOMEWAY.COM., INC. REPRESENTED BY SIBEL ABREU, PARALEGAL IS PRESENTVIA ZOOM. PARTIES STIPULATE TO A POTENTIAL SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF MUST TIMELY SUBMIT A REQUEST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED FEB-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY.COM, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY.COM, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,395.00 FILED BY SOHN, SONIA AS TO DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY.COM, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY.COM, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM (SC-100) FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOHN, SONIA AS TO DEFENDANT HOMEAWAY.COM, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO HOMEAWAY.COM-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/RTS
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT) **GRANTED**
